text:
Once upon a chilly morning, Lily visited her old friend Max. She'd last seen him five years ago.

They talked for hours about their grandkids. Max had five – charming little tykes. They giggled constantly.

Lily pondered how much fun it would be to have those little feet tickling her.

"You'll laugh," Max said confidently.

They planned to go to the park later.

There they were – a grumpy old man with a cane and wide eyes. A quick glance told them he might be ticklish.

"Lilac thinks those tickles would be wonderful," Max said proudly.

"Max," Lily said, her imagination whirring, "let's try it. Say hello to the ticklish old man!"

She wiggled and danced around. Max chuckled before gently stroking her feathers.

"I guess we do have something in common," Max mused.

A few more giggles later, Max pointed dramatically.

"This way!"
